title: a drought in search of cash and not love;
content:
a drought in search of cash and not love;
the returnal archiving begins>
refound pride and passion>>
accidents>>>
FL04T[1NG]_P01NT[+]>>>>
a new OS>>>>>

becoming a fan of myself
putting me on a pedestal
come into my museum, it's a mirror


-

-


style v2 (remixes album art was v1)
photo 3, 4, 5,
are accidental glitches when i was watching pornography, i loved accidental art, and glitch and cubism, this spoke right to me divinely, and i frame it as another phase of this style's evolution

and the lover who knew my art, Madison, loved me and loved me she did,

a new digital photography cubist study
original photos , and original slices
madison &me , summer dorm
